ogTitle: Mount Glorious vs Mount Gravatt East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Glorious and Mount Gravatt East.
heading: Mount Glorious vs Mount Gravatt East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Glorious, Queensland and Mount Gravatt East, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Gravatt East has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Mount Glorious (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Glorious or Mount Gravatt East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Glorious has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Mount Gravatt East scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Glorious scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Gravatt East scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Glorious or Mount Gravatt East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Gravatt East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
